resumeContent: A calm and stoic but naturally caring man, who runs the Kaiketsu-ya (解決屋, Problem Solving Office) in the Kabukichō district of the capital city.
He mainly helps humans with various missions but he also sometimes works for clans.
intro.resumeLine: Who chooses the cards chooses the victor.
intro.title: Introduction
content: Kai Kusanagi is the enigmatic manager of Kaiketsu-ya, a problem-solving office that is located in a discreet alley of the japanese capital city. A priest with questionable faith and a handyman, he wears many hats within the human community, offering his help and all kind of services to those in need, although he may sometimes work for certain clan members as well.

He takes on contracts of all kinds, ranging from simple object retrieval to escorting people, to more perilous missions; as long as the client pays and the cause seems just to him. Although he is a man of the church, Kai is not particularly religious and does not follow the precepts of faith to the letter, preferring to rely on his own judgment and personal morality to guide his life and actions.

desires.title: Wants
content: He hopes to restore dignity and glory to humanity. Kai aspires to a country where humans are no longer in the background and no longer subject to clan control. He also wishes to learn more about the Shokans and their true nature.

fears.title: Fears
content: He fears that the influence of the clans will become so great that humans lose all autonomy and are reduced to the state of puppets. He also fears that the Shokans will become a source of conflict and fracture between knights.

physical.title: Physical Description
content: Standing at 1.96m and weighing nearly 95kg, Kai is a man with an imposing build, with broad shoulders, long legs and particularly developed musculature. He has short black hair styled with some strands that naturally fall forward. He has a piercing gaze, with almond-shaped, amber and shiny eyes.
In terms of clothing, he wears a shirt with a clerical collar, fitted pants and high boots. He also has a long dark coat that reaches his knees, which he wears on his shoulders.
Tattoo/scar: Kai wears a mark applied with iron on the back of his right hand, hidden under his black glove.

psychological.title: Psychological Profile
content: Calm, stoic and thoughtful, Kai is a self-assured man who shows great self-control. This independent character can make him seem distant or cold, but he is actually very empathetic and attentive.
Qualities: In addition to being persevering and having unwavering determination, Kai is able to keep his cool in any circumstance. He is naturally caring and protective even if he hides it.

Flaws: He is difficult to bond with because he is very secretive and does not easily trust. He does not mince his words and can sometimes be too direct, which can hurt. Kai also has very little sense of humor.

intro.title: Description
content: The Tarot Shokan takes the form of 78 blank metal cards, similar in size to the game of the same name. As solid and sharp as the blade of a sword, these cards are primarily used as throwing weapons, but can also be used in close combat like a combat fan, allowing the user to attack and defend using techniques inspired by tessenjutsu.

The particularity of this Shokan lies in the ability of its bearer to infuse different effects into his cards, by invoking the symbolism of the major arcana of the tarot. Each card can thus temporarily be imbued with the influence of a major arcana, such as Strength, Temperance or The Sun, and confer to the knight-cartomancer or his attacks specific properties and effects related to their symbolism.

At the maximum mastery level, the Tarot Shokan can call upon the influence of the 22 major arcana, and its user becomes capable of combining the effects of several cards simultaneously, creating synergies and more complex techniques.

power.limitsDesc: This Shokan remains however strongly limited by the level and rank of the knight, which determine the number of major arcana he can use. The cards become ineffective when they move more than 15 meters away from their bearer. Beyond this distance, they automatically disappear to reappear in the user's hand. Finally, because of their sharp nature, Kai must wear a protective glove to avoid injuring himself while handling them.
power.title: Shokan
power.name: Tarot

1.name: VIII - Strength
1.desc: When under the influence of this arcana, the physical abilities of the card bearer are considerably amplified for a short duration. The card itself becomes heavier and more solid, allowing it to inflict increased damage on impact.

2.name: XIV - Temperance
2.desc: Because of his rank and level of mastery, Kai has not yet unlocked the effect related to this arcana.

3.name: XIX - The Sun
3.desc: Because of his rank and level of mastery, Kai has not yet unlocked the effect related to this arcana.

4.name: XX - The Judgement
4.desc: Because of his rank and level of mastery, Kai has not yet unlocked the effect related to this arcana.
